What is the best season to visit to THAI:
Thailand is a year round destination with three distinct seasons:
• Cool & Dry Season (November – March)
• Hot Season (April – June)
• Rainy Season (July – October)
The best time to travel is between November and April, when the weather remains cool and dry, creating perfect conditions for outdoor activities, sightseeing, and beach holidays.
Do we need a Visa for THAILAND & is ther:
Indian passport holders are eligible for Free Visa on Arrival.
From 01 May 2025, all non‑Thai citizens must complete the Thailand Digital Arrival Card (TDAC) online within 3 days before arrival. This replaces paper arrival cards and speeds up immigration.
Register here: https://tdac.immigration.go.th
How many days are ideal for a vacation t: To experience the different - aspects of Thailand, plan to stay at least 5–7 days.
What is local curreny of THAILAND: THAILAND's local currency Is THAI BAHT
What kind of meals can we expect on our: The breakfast is Continental which is provided by hotels & options of Vegeterian is comparetively less than that of Non Veg Dishes. Lunches are in Indian restaurants which provide Pure  Jain, Indian Veg & Non Veg Meals. YES Jain food is available during Lunches & Dinner.
Is THAILAND a good destination for Senio: It’s a perfect destination for Senior Citizens. It’s an all inclusive tour and the pace is ideal for all types of customers. The tour is also specifically designed in a way that Seniors can also enjoy every part of the tour. Walking is required at some places of sightseeing but its easily manageble.
Is THAILAND a good destination for Child: THAILAND is an excellent destination for children because of the abundance of kid-friendly attractions like zoos, aquariums, cultral shows , well-maintained gardens offering a unique blend of diverse culture, modern technology suitable for families with kids all age. Apart from  sightseeing the History, knowledge / geogrphical knowledge is interesting and they will surely go back home being smarter about a new country.
What about local sim card?:
For SIM card one can opt for international roaming on their India Number or can buy a local DTAC simcard for 200 THB with local & international calling and data services. 
DTAC offers tourist SIM cards and eSIMs in Thailand with unlimited data, local calls, and international credit, making them a convenient choice for travelers.
Tap water is safe to drink on tour?: In THAILAND tap water is NOT drinkable. A bottle of water will cost not 10 - 20 THB (about ₹25–₹50) at convenience stores like 7‑Eleven or FamilyMart.
Can we take the wheel chair guest bookin: NO. Accessibility for wheel guests is different from the regular guests, this would also hamper & slow down the running of the itinerary. The wheel chair would also take a lot of space in the luggage compartment & we would not be able to fit the groups baggage due to space constrain.
Is it necessary to carry a universal ada: Indian adaptors (Type C) generally work in Thailand since both countries use 220–240V, 50Hz. However, Thailand also has Type O sockets, so carrying a universal adaptor is recommended to ensure compatibility everywhere.
What is the average meal cost in Thailan: The average meal cost ranges from 50–200 THB. Street food dishes like Pad Thai or fried rice are around 40–70 THB, casual restaurants charge 100–200 THB, while mid‑range dining for two can be 500–900 THB. Upscale restaurants may cost 500 THB or more per person.
Do I need any vaccinations before travel:
It is always a good idea to be prepared before you set out on your journey to Thailand tour.
Travelers are often advised to consider vaccines for Hepatitis A, Hepatitis B, Typhoid, and Rabies depending on activities and length of stay.
How much local cash should I carry when: You should carry around 3,000–5,000 THB in cash, which is approximately ₹8,300–₹13,900 in Indian currency. This amount is enough for local expenses like street food, tuk‑tuks, and markets, while larger payments can be made using cards or ATMs.
What are the tipping charges in Thailand: Tipping is not mandatory but appreciated. USD 5
Are there Long Drives involved in our TH: Yes. On the day of arrival - Suvarnabhumi Airport to Pattaya City and when we travel from Pattaya to Bangkok city - the drive would be approximately 2-2.5 hours one way depending upon the traffic situation in the city.
How much Walk on Thailand tour is expect: THAILAND tours can include a significant amount of walking, depending on the locations visited.On an average walking on tour will be 3-4 km per day.
Can I use my Indian driver's license in: You cannot legally drive in Thailand with just an Indian driver’s license. To drive as a tourist, you need an International Driving Permit (IDP) along with your Indian license.
What local laws must tourists remember w:
Tourists should be aware of the following important laws and customs:
- Smoking Restrictions – Smoking is banned in many public areas, including beaches, parks, and public transport. Violations can result in fines.
- E-cigarettes & Vaping – Importing or using e-cigarettes is illegal in Thailand and can lead to fines or confiscation.
- Alcohol Laws – Alcohol sales are restricted during certain hours (usually 2–5 PM and midnight–11 AM).
- Dress Code for Temples – Tourists must dress modestly when visiting temples (cover shoulders and knees). Disrespectful attire may result in denial of entry.
- Driving Laws – An International Driving Permit (IDP) is required for non‑ASEAN tourists. Driving without it can lead to fines and invalid insurance.
- Visa & Immigration Rules – Overstaying your visa is a serious offense and can lead to fines, detention, or deportation.
- Public Behavior – Showing disrespect to Buddhist images is also illegal.
Is Thailand a good honeymoon destination: Yes, Thailand is one of the most popular honeymoon spots worldwide, offering a mix of romance, adventure, and affordability
What makes Thailand romantic for couples: Secluded beaches, private pool villas, sunset cruises, and luxury spas create the perfect romantic atmosphere.
Which islands are best for a honeymoon i:
Phuket – lively beaches, nightlife, and luxury resorts
Koh Samui – private villas, tranquil beaches, and spas
Krabi – dramatic limestone cliffs and island-hopping tours
Phi Phi Islands – turquoise waters and stunning scenery
Is Thailand affordable compared to other: Yes, Thailand offers luxury experiences at lower costs than Europe or the Maldives, making it budget-friendly without compromising quality.
Why should I go to THAILAND?: THAILAND - "The Land of Smiles" - has diverse landscapes including stunning beaches, lush greenery, ancient temples, vibrant cities, delicious cuisine, affordable prices, friendly people and rich cultural experiences, making it a great choice for a variety of travelers seeking relaxation, adventure, or historical exploration.
Which are the countries I can club with: Singapore & Malaysia are the countries that can be clubbed with THAILAND. We have different packages with the above countries clubbed with THAILAND.
Can we book our own Air Tickets?: YES, we have an option known as 'JOINING DIRECT', We also offer airport transfers to guests who take 'Joining Direct' Options.
Which class are we offering in the airli: We are offering Economy class in all the airlines
Which airport will we land?: Mostly all flights in Thailand packages land at Survanabhumi International Airport in Bangkok.
Why do we go to Pattaya first even if we:
Considering the flight arrival timings guests reach Pattaya hotel around the time of check in so that they get a qucker check in and time to relax at the hotel.
Guests can shop to their hearts content in Bangkok without worrying about carrying the luggage everywhere as they
fly out of Bangkok
Will we do any sight-seeing on the way t: No the transfers are end to end without any sightseeing in between.
Will the breakfast be Buffet or A la car: Breakfast at the hotel will be in a Buffet system
Will they wait for me if I am late for a: No. The timings for sightseeing tours and transfer are fixed and hence the driver/guide/representative will not wait for any passengers beyond the given departure time. Guests are requested to be ready at the pickup point at least 15 minutes prior to given departure time.
Why can’t we prebook these from here?: All the adventure/Water activities depend on the weather conditions; hence we do not prebook these activities from India and encourage the guests to buy these locally as per their choice.
What if I don’t want to do the Temple to: Guests not wanting to the city and temple tour cn wait at hotel lobby, choose any other optional tour, explore city on their own.
What are good shopping places in Bangkok:
 Malls: - MBK Mall, CentralWorld, Siam Paragon
 Chatuchak Market
 Asiatique the Riverfront
 Siam Square
 Khao San Road – Night Market
 Pantip Plaza - Computer Shopping Mall
 Pratunam is well-known among locals as the wholesale fashion district
What is the Alcazar Show? Why is it popu:
The Alcazar Show in Pattaya is a world-famous cabaret performance featuring dazzling costumes, music, and dance by talented artists.
It offers a vibrant mix of culture, glamour, and entertainment, making it a must-see evening attraction.
What is Coral Island known for?: Coral Island (Koh Larn) is famous for its clear waters, coral reefs, and water sports activities.
How do visitors reach the island?: By speed boat, which adds excitement to the journey.
What is special about the glass bottom b: It allows visitors to view colorful marine life and coral formations without getting into the water.
What can visitors see at Nong Nooch Vill:
A blend of Thai cultural shows, elephant performances, and beautifully landscaped gardens.
It combines traditional Thai heritage with entertainment, giving tourists a taste of local culture and nature in one place.
What is Wat Pho temple famous for? Why s:
Wat Pho is home to the Reclining Buddha, one of the largest Buddha statues in Thailand, and is considered the birthplace of traditional Thai massage.
It’s a spiritual and cultural landmark, offering a glimpse into Thai heritage and artistry
What makes Wat Traimit special? What doe:
It houses the Golden Buddha, a solid gold statue weighing over 5 tons, discovered after being hidden under plaster for centuries.
The statue represents resilience and faith, making it a significant religious and historical treasure.
What is the Chao Phraya Dinner Cruise?: A scenic evening cruise along Bangkok’s main river, offering dinner with views of illuminated temples and city landmarks.
Chao Phraya Dinner Cruise why is it popu: It combines fine dining, live entertainment, and breathtaking night views of Bangkok, creating a romantic and memorable experience.
What is Safari World?: Safari World is an open zoo in Bangkok where visitors can drive through and see animals roaming freely in natural habitats.
How many parks does Safari World have?: Safari World consists of two parks — Safari Park and Marine Park.
What is Safari Park?: Safari Park is an open zoo where visitors can drive through and see animals like lions, tigers, giraffes, and zebras roaming freely in natural-style habitats.
What is Marine Park?: Marine Park is a themed section with animal shows, aquariums, and attractions featuring dolphins, sea lions, birds, and stunt performances.
Can visitors explore both parks in one d: Yes, most tour packages and tickets include access to both parks, and a full day is recommended to enjoy all activities.
Why visit both Safari World and Marine P: Together, they provide a full-day adventure — from thrilling wildlife encounters to entertaining stage shows.
How long should visitors plan to spend h: At least half a day to a full day is recommended to enjoy both sections fully.
What shows are popular in Safari World?: Dolphin shows, sea lion performances, bird shows, and stunt shows are highlights.
What is the Standard Check in & Check ou: Standard Check in time is  2 or 3 pm and Check out time is 11 am at Hotels in THAILAND.
What are the category of hotels ?: We would be using 3 & 4* property depending on the package selected by one.
Do Hotels in THAILAND provide Kettle & T: Yes. Hotels have Kettle and English Tea and Coffee Sahets along with sugar and creamer, which they replenish once everyday.
Do Hotels in THAILAND provide Dental Kit: Yes. Most of the Hotels in THAILAND that we use provide with Dental Kit and Shaving Kit, however it is subject to availability OR until they have stock.
Are there Saftey Deposit Lockers in Hote: Yes. All the Hotels have Saftey Depoist Locker in all the rooms. Password needs to be set individually and retained for using the same.
Will I get porter service at the airport:
No. There is no portor services included in the package. You have to carry your own luggage from airport to transfer
and also at all other places
Does hotels in Thailand haveWi-Fi? Is it: Free! WiFi is available in the hotel rooms and is free of charge.
Do we have any optionals in THAILAND ?: YES you can prebook it in India with transfers with your sales agent OR you can pay for the same to the TM once landing in THAILAND.On our premium tours in THAILAND we have all inclusive itinerary, however on our Value/ Cost Saver Tours one can book optional  with Safari World and Marine Park with meal and transfers in Bangkok. One can opt for Sealife Aquarium as well on Free day in Bangkok.
How do I book the Optional offered on To: One can either pre book the optional activity with the sales agent while booking the tour in India OR One on the day of arrival in THAILAND one can book the optional activity with Tour Manger by making 100 % advance cash payment in Local currency THB to the Tour Manger.
If Optional Activity is booked on Tour w: Optional activity can be booked only against 100 % advance cash payment in USD Or THB Only, if booked on tour with the Tour Manger.
Can one pay by Credit/ Debit Card or in: NO. Optional activites on tour will be booked against 100 % cash advance in USD or THB Only. TM will not accept Debit/ Credit Card or Indian Rupees for Optional Activites on Tour.
What if I don’t need the meals and I man: It is possible but we normally first go for dinner & then go back to the hotel & till then you would need to wait for the group to finish their meal. There would be no reduction in your tour cost if you opt not to take any meals.
What if I don’t want to eat Indian meals: Yes you can have local meal , however you will have to manage such meals on your own and there wont be any refunds for Indian meals.
What is the time difference between Thai: Thailand is 1 hour and 30 minutes ahead of India.
Are direct flights available from India: Yes, several airlines operate direct flights from major Indian cities to Thailand
Which airlines operate these direct rout: Airlines such as Thai Airways, Air India, IndiGo, Vistara, and SpiceJet offer nonstop services.
What are the main airports in Thailand f:
1) Bangkok (Suvarnabhumi Airport & Don Mueang Airport)
2) Phuket International Airport
3) Chiang Mai International Airport (limited routes)
How long is the flight duration from Ind: Direct flights typically take 3.5 to 5 hours, depending on the departure city in India
Are these flights frequent from India to: Yes, Bangkok especially has multiple daily direct flights from India, while Phuket and Chiang Mai have fewer but regular connections.
Is direct cash deposit allowed?: No, direct cash deposit is not permitted under the current policy.
What alternatives are available instead: Payments can be made through online payment mode like Debit card , Credit card , Net Banking , UPI and Offline like NEFT and Bank transfers,
Is cheque deposit allowed?: No, cheque deposit is not permitted under the current policy.
What does TCS stand for?: TCS stands for Tax Collected at Source
What is Tax Collected at Source (TCS) on: TCS is a Tax that is collected by the government for an International holiday
At what rate is TCS applied?:
5% on outbound tour packages up to INR 10 lakh per individual per annum
20% on amounts beyond INR 10 lakh per individual per annum
Why must the payer’s name and PAN be rec: To ensure the correct individual receives the TCS credit in their tax records, the payer’s name and PAN must be verified at the time of booking
Is TCS refundable if the tour is cancell:
No. Even if the services are cancelled and the tour cost refunded, the TCS amount will not be refunded. It will still be reflected in the payer’s Form 26AS for claiming credit.
Customer can claim it by filing an Income Tax Returns
What is the age limit for standard trave: Coverage is generally included for travelers up to 60 years of age under standard plans.
What happens if the traveler is above 60: Travelers above 60 years are still eligible, but additional charges/premium apply due to higher medical risk.
What does SIC stand for in travel servic: SIC stands for Seat-in-Coach, a type of shared transfer service.
What are SIC transfers?: SIC transfers mean travelers share a coach or bus with other passengers, instead of having a private vehicle.
How do SIC transfers work?: Travelers are picked up and dropped off at designated points (like hotels or airports) along a fixed route, with multiple passengers traveling together
Is travel insurance mandatory for intern: Yes, travel insurance is mandatory for International travel
What happens if my passport is damaged?: A damaged passport is considered invalid and cannot be used for international travel
What qualifies as a damaged passport?: Passports with torn pages, water damage, missing information, tampered laminations, or unreadable details are treated as damaged.
Can I still travel with a damaged passpo: No. Airlines and immigration authorities will not accept a damaged passport for travel.
What should I do if my passport is damag: You must apply for a reissue of passport under the “Damaged Passport” category at the Passport Office or online through the Passport Seva portal.
What exactly is included in Thomas Cook: Thomas Cook holiday packages typically include flights, accommodation, transfers, meals, sightseeing tours, and travel insurance, but the exact inclusions vary depending on the destination and type of package chosen.
What is not included in Thomas Cook pack: Any deviations, taxes, personal expenses, tips, extra meals, excursions are not included in the packages.
What do you mean by GIT - Group Inclusiv:
Group Tours are Pre-arranged tours where a group of travelers follows the same itinerary. 
It is best for: Families, corporate groups, students, or anyone who prefers a structured, hassle-free trip.
Features: 
•  Fixed departure dates.
•  Standardized itinerary (same hotels, meals, sightseeing for all).
•  Guided tours with a tour manager.
•  Cost-effective because expenses are shared across the group.
What do you mean by FIT - Free Independe:
Customized packages designed for individuals, couples, or small groups.
It is best for: Honeymooners, solo travelers, or those who want unique experiences at their own pace.
Features:
- Flexible dates — you choose when to travel.
- Tailor-made itineraries (you pick destinations, hotels, activities).
- More privacy and freedom compared to group tours.
- Usually higher cost than GIT because it’s personalized.
What type of meals (breakfast, lunch, di:
Meals are usually included daily in Thomas Cook packages, but the type and frequency depend on the package chosen. Most packages cover breakfast every day, with some offering half-board (breakfast + dinner) or all-inclusive (all meals).
Meals are only included as per the itinerary. Anything outside (like room service, special restaurants, or extra snacks) is at personal expense.
What do you mean by Half- Board packages: Half-Board Packages – Breakfast + one additional meal (usually dinner).
What do you mean by Full-Board / All-Inc: Full-Board / All-Inclusive Packages – Breakfast, lunch, dinner, and sometimes drinks/snacks.
Are airport transfers included in Thomas:
Yes — airport transfers are generally included in Thomas Cook holiday packages, but it depends on the type of package you book
Imp : 
•  Transfers are only included as per the itinerary.
•  Deviations (different arrival/departure dates or airports) may incur extra charges
What does Joining Direct Mean?: Joining Direct is a flexible option for travelers who want to skip the group’s departure city and meet the tour directly at the destination, with airfare excluded but all other tour services included.
What does “Joining Direct” Involves?:
Joining Direct Packages Involve: 
•  No group flight from India:
You arrange your own international flight to the destination where the tour begins.
•  Meet the group abroad:
You join the rest of the tour participants at the first hotel or meeting point overseas.
•  Package adjustments:
Since airfare from India is excluded, the package cost is reduced accordingly.
•  Flexibility:
Useful for passengers already abroad, or those who prefer to book their own flight
Is Joining Direct packages cost effectiv: The “joining direct” price is lower than the full package price because flight is not included in the package, however customer have to bear the cost of reaching the destination by themself.
What is the Imp condidtion that need to: Customer must arrive on the exact date/time the group itinerary starts; deviations may incur extra charges.
Are internal transfers included in Thoma: Internal transfers are included in Thomas Cook packages when they are part of the planned itinerary, but any deviations or special requests are extra.
Are attraction tickets included in the p:
Attraction tickets are included in Thomas Cook packages for the sights and experiences mentioned in the itinerary. Anything extra or optional must be paid separately.
Optional excursions, special shows, or local guides are not included unless specified
What is the luggage limit?:
The luggage limit in Thomas Cook packages depends on the airline being used, but typically includes one checked-in bag (around 20–23 kg) and one cabin bag (around 7–10 kg).
Airline-specific rules apply: Thomas Cook packages use different carriers depending on destination, so allowances vary.
•  Excess baggage: Any weight beyond the limit must be paid directly to the airline
Are guide charges included?: Guide charges are included in Thomas Cook packages only for the sightseeing and excursions specified in the itinerary
What type of room is included?: The type of room included in Thomas Cook packages is usually a standard category room at the selected hotel, unless the brochure/itinerary specifies otherwise
What is LCC ?:
LCC in the travel industry stands for Low-Cost Carrier
These airlines offer low base fares but charge extra for services like meals, seat selection. Examples include IndiGo, AirAsia, and SpiceJet.
Why LCC ?: Considering that most destinations are less than 4 hours of flying & the number of LCC options now available from so many hubs.
If my Thomas Cook package has an LCC fli: In case of LCC flights, Baggage & Meals will be included --- (Meals only for the Main sector (India to International), and not domestic connections)
What is FSC?:
FSC in the travel inductry stands for - Full-Service Carrier 
Higher fare - includes bundled services
 These airlines include meals, and other services in the ticket price. Examples include Emirates, Singapore Airlines, Vistara, and Lufthansa.
Will i get direct flight of via flight w: We will provide Direct flights as the first preference, or via flights with a minimum 2 hrs - 5 hrs 30 min maximum layover
Is early check-in included with Thomas C: Early check-in for Air Inclusive packages is included if Arrival time at the hotel is before 7:00 am - *Above rules are not applicable for Japan, Korea, China, CIS, Hongkong &Budget / Cost Saver Tours+ (+ as appl across destinations wherever launched).*
Can I ask for Specific Airline in Thomas: Yes, if you prefer a particular airline, we can arrange it depending on availability. A supplement cost will apply , The airline team will advise the exact cost.
Are mini-bar charges included in Thomas: No, mini-bar charges are not included. Guests must pay directly to the hotel for any items consumed.
What does porter service mean?: Porter service means assistance with carrying and handling your luggage at airports, hotels, or stations, usually provided by staff or porters for a fee
Are porterage fees included in Thomas Co:
No, porterage fees are not included. Guests must pay directly to the hotel or porter service.
Porterage charges are excluded from Thomas Cook package inclusions. Since porterage is treated as a personal service, travelers are responsible for paying these fees at hotels, airports, or stations where applicable.
Can meals be converted to vegetarian?: Yes, Thomas Cook packages generally include Indian Jain, vegetarian, and non-vegetarian lunches as part of the meal plan, depending on the destination and itinerary.
Are theme park express passes included?: Thomas Cook packages cover standard admission tickets to theme parks as per the itinerary. Express passes, priority access passes, or fast-track tickets to rides and attractions are considered optional add-ons and are excluded from the package cost. Travelers must buy them directly from the park
Are city tours half-day or full-day?: Thomas Cook packages include city tours as per the itinerary. These may be half-day (approximately 3–4 hours)
Do Thomas Cook packages include travel i: Thomas Cook packages come with ICICI Lombard travel insurance. Coverage typically includes medical emergencies, hospitalization abroad, baggage loss/delay, and personal accident benefits. Travelers should review the policy document for coverage limits, exclusions, and claim procedures.
What is TravSure Program?:
TravSure is a special protection plan offered with Thomas Cook packages. It gives you peace of mind by covering emergencies like : 
•  It provides 24/7 assistance, refunds/rescheduling in emergencies, and coverage for disruptions (e.g., war , political unrest, airspace closures).
•  TravSure = extra protection beyond insurance, giving travelers confidence and support during emergencies.
Is TravSure part of my package automatic: Yes. When you book an international group tour with Thomas Cook or SOTC, TravSure coverage is automatically included. You don’t need to add it separately.
Are flight rescheduling costs covered if: Yes. If your flight was booked through Thomas Cook or SOTC, rescheduling costs will be covered. In such cases, the airline team will coordinate directly with the concerned authorities to arrange the reschedule.
Will hotel accommodation be provided if: Yes. In the event of flight disruptions caused by war, hotel stays at the destination or during transit are covered.
What is the maximum coverage for air and: The coverage limit is up to USD 1,500 per person for international trips.
Is trip curtailment due to war or airspa: Yes, customers are eligible for a refund of unused trip services.
Which types of emergencies are covered u: TravSure provides protection in situations such as geopolitical tensions, war-like conditions, airline cancellations, and airspace closures.
Are there any costs involved if I resche: No. TravSure ensures that both rescheduling and cancellation are provided at no extra cost when the situation falls under covered emergencies.
Is extra insurance part of TravSure bene: Yes. Along with standard coverage, TravSure offers additional insurance protection to handle unexpected situations during travel.
If I get stranded while traveling, who w: A dedicated 24x7 support team is available to assist you immediately, offering guidance and solutions until your journey continues.
Are there extra expenses in case of trav: No. TravSure takes care of rescheduling and cancellations in covered situations, ensuring no extra costs for you.
Is TravSure applicable for business trav: TravSure is designed mainly for international group tours. For business travel, Thomas Cook provides dedicated services separately to meet corporate needs.
How can I activate TravSure coverage?: You don’t need to take any extra steps. TravSure coverage is automatically included whenever you book an eligible international group tour with Thomas Cook or SOTC.
What is TCTP: TCTP = Thomas Cook’s Trip Protection Plan, a bundled safeguard covering medical, cancellation, baggage, and accident emergencies during travel.
What is the final tour cost in Thomas Co: Your final tour cost is the complete price of your holiday package. It includes the base package cost (flights, hotels, transfers, meals, sightseeing) plus any Airline Supplements + Visa Fees + Insurance + Optional Add-ons + Taxes/Surcharges are also part of the final cost
Is the price of Thomas Cook packages fix: The price is dynamic. It can change based on airline fares, hotel rates, currency exchange, and availability.
What is MDB ?: The minimum booking deposit (MBD) for Thomas Cook packages is typically a partial upfront payment required to secure your booking, with the balance payable before departure. It is not a fixed amount—it varies by package type, destination, and airline/hotel conditions.
Is the Minimum Booking Deposit (MBD) ref: No, the Minimum Booking Deposit is non-refundable once paid.
Is Cash Deposit Accepted to book the pac: Direct Cash Deposit is not allowed.
What do you mean by “cancellation” in Th: If you decide not to travel after booking your holiday, that’s called a cancellation. In such cases, Thomas Cook applies cancellation charges depending on how many days before departure you cancel.
How are cancellation charges determined: Cancellation charges are applied based on the number of days prior to departure when the booking is canceled.
What are the normal cancellation charges:
0 to 7 days before departure → 100% cancellation charge
08 to 21 days before departure → 90% cancellation charge
22 to 45 days before departure → 70% cancellation charge
46 days and above before departure → 50% cancellation charge
What are the cancellation charges under:
0 to 7 days before departure → 90% cancellation charge
08 to 21 days before departure → 70% cancellation charge
22 to 45 days before departure → 50% cancellation charge
46 days and above before departure → 15% cancellation charge
What is an Early Bird Discount?: If you confirm your booking early, Thomas Cook rewards you with an Early Bird Discount. Its a special price reduction offered to customers who book their holiday package well in advance.
What does BOGO Stand for: BOGO stands for “Buy One, Get One.”
What is a BOGO offer?: BOGO (Buy One, Get One) in Thomas Cook packages applies to adult travelers. When one adult pays for the package, another adult is entitled to travel free.
What is the validity of passport require: For Thomas Cook international packages, the passport validity requirement is minimum 6 months from the date of return. This is a standard rule followed by most countries to process visas and allow entry. Passports with shorter validity may lead to visa rejection or denial of boarding. Travelers must also ensure sufficient blank pages for visa stamps
How can I contact Thomas Cook again?: You can reach Thomas Cook by calling the toll-free number 1800-2099-100 for assistance.
Can you do web check-in for me?: No, Thomas Cook cannot perform web check-in on your behalf. Travelers must complete web check-in directly with the airline through its website or mobile app.

I want to speak to someone in person in: You’re always welcome at the branch, but booking here online means no waiting, no hassle - and you still get expert guidance, instant seat blocking, and unbeatable prices. Let’s get you the best deal right now.
I don’t trust online bookings — it can b: That’s completely understandable. Our online support mirrors the in-branch experience, with the same trusted travel expertise. Plus, you get access to limited-time offers and can block your seats instantly - all from wherever you are.
How many blank pages should a passport h: Passports must have sufficient blank pages for visa stamps
Are handwritten letters or documents in: No, all letters must be typed and in English.

•  Supporting documents of the person they depend on
What documents are required for governme:
•  NOC from concerned department with designation & leave dates
•  Name & designation of sanctioning authority
•  Last 3 months salary slips, 3 years Form-16, 6 months bank statements
